attributes.action: Employ someone in government who has run or is running a small / micro business
attributes.additional_details: I want this addressed because many small / micro business owners have more than one job to keep things going and many of them will be going out of business very soon. Have you looked at the statistics? What will you do when we all go under?
attributes.background: The government does not have a clue what small / micro business owners are dealing with, we need someone in the cabinet who does.

rejection.details: We are not clear about the action that this petition is seeking. Across both the Civil Service and the UK Government there are individuals with a range of previous experiences and expertise.
